python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor')
lines = (root / 'hooks/useExternalDrop.ts').read_text().splitlines()
start = next(i for i,l in enumerate(lines, start=1) if l.startswith('export function useExternalDrop('))
print('useExternalDrop_hook_body_lines=', len(lines) - start + 1)
print('useClipEditing_total_lines=', len((root / 'hooks/useClipEditing.ts').read_text().splitlines()))
PY
